title: DPTOOL Engine Camshaft Alignment Timing Tool Kit for BMW Mini Copper N12 N14 1.4 1.6 Citroen Peugeot N16 Engines
features: Practical: This Camshaft Alignment Timing Tool Kit works for vehicle models: Mini Cooper Mini One/ HB Cooper/ Cooper/ Cooper S, Citoen C4/ C4 Picasso, Peugeot 207/ 207CC/ 308 & Engine types: N12/N14 (1.4L / 1.6L VTI - Turbo), EP3(8FS), EP6(5FW), EP6C, 1.6THP, EP6DT(5FX), EP6DTS(5FY)

Fitment: Models Years – Mini One Coupe R56 (2006-2010), Mini Cooper Coupe R56 (2006-2010), Mini Cooper HB R55 (2007-2010), Citroen C4 (2008-2009), Citroen C4 Picasso (2008-2009), Peugeot 207 (2006-2010), Peugeot 207CC (2007-2010), Peugeot 308 (2001-2010), Peugeot 3008 (2009-2012), Peugeot 5008 (2009-2012)

Content: Package includes camshaft locking tool – inlet, camshaft locking tool – exhaust, inlet camshaft locking tool, camshaft alignment clamp, crankshaft setting pin, chain tensioner, M6 setscrews (4), and carrying case

Applicaiton: -For replacing the cylinder head sealing and motor timing. -Suitable for BMW , Mini, Citroen, Peugeot 1.4, 1.6 V16 petrol . -For setting camshaft timing on the N12, N14 Mini Cooper engine.

Locking Camshaft For locking camshaft in TDC position when checking/adjusting camshaft timing , replacing inlet camshaft or timing chain. This tools will be needed for replacing the cylinder head sealing and motor timing. Camshaft Locking Tool for N12, N14 This camshaft Locking use on BMW Citroen N12, N14 engine. Camshaft Locking Tool for N16 This camshaft Locking use on BMW Citroen N16 engine. use tips First tighten the screws on both sides. Then fine-tune the alignment and tighten the screws in the middle, If you tighten the screws in the middle first and then the screws on both sides, it will be difficult to alignment.
